### Parcel GPS measurement

```{r}
#| label: parcel gps measurement table

parcel_gps_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "parcel_gps_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::parcel_gps(
  parcel_df = parcel_gps_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  gps_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$parcel_gps_gps_var),
  not_measured_val = as.numeric(params_df$parcel_gps_not_measured_val),
  why_no_gps_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$parcel_gps_why_not_measured_var),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)

```
